label: 初中
description: 初中英语词汇（含例句简写）

words.example: I have a book. 我有一本书。
Learning a foreign language requires ability. 学习外语需要能力。
I am able to swim. 我能够游泳。
Tell me about yourself. 告诉我关于你的情况。
The picture is above the sofa. 图画在沙发上方。
He studies abroad. 他在国外学习。
Tom was absent from school yesterday. 汤姆昨天没来上学。
I accept your invitation. 我接受你的邀请。
There was a car accident. 发生了一起车祸。
Please check your bank account. 请检查你的银行账户。
I have a headache. 我头痛。
Walk across the bridge. 走过这座桥。
Act quickly!_快点行动！
Take action now. 现在就采取行动。
He is active in class. 他在课堂上很积极。
School activities are fun. 学校活动很有趣。
Add some sugar to the tea. 在茶里加点糖。
What's your address?_你的地址是什么？
I admire your courage. 我钦佩你的勇气。
He admitted his mistake. 他承认了自己的错误。
Adults should set good examples. 成年人应该树立好榜样。
The army advanced toward the enemy. 军队向敌人前进。
Can you give me some advice?_你能给我一些建议吗？
I advise you to study harder. 我建议你更加努力学习。
I can't afford a new car. 我买不起新车。
I'm afraid of snakes. 我害怕蛇。
After lunch, we went shopping. 午饭后，我们去购物了。
See you this afternoon. 今天下午见。
Please say it again. 请再说一遍。
We are against smoking. 我们反对吸烟。
What's your age?_你多大了？
I met him three days ago. 我三天前见过他。
I agree with you. 我同意你的观点。
Both sides signed the agreement. 双方签署了协议。
Fresh air is good for health. 新鲜空气有益健康。
Let's meet at the airport. 我们在机场见面吧。
The fish is still alive. 鱼还活着。
All students must attend. 所有学生都必须参加。
My parents allow me to stay out late. 我父母允许我晚归。
I almost forgot. 我差点忘了。
He lives alone. 他独自生活。
Walk along this street. 沿着这条街走。
Read aloud, please. 请大声朗读。
I have already finished. 我已经完成了。
She is also coming. 她也要来。
Although it's raining, we'll go. 尽管在下雨，我们还是要去。
He always arrives on time. 他总是准时到达。

words.chinese: 是（be的第一人称单数形式）
words.example: I am a student. 我是学生。
The view is amazing. 景色令人惊叹。
America is a developed country. 美国是发达国家。
He is American. 他是美国人。
He sat among his friends. 他坐在朋友们中间。
A large amount of water evaporated. 大量水分蒸发了。
She is an artist. 她是一名艺术家。
Bread and butter is my breakfast. 面包和黄油是我的早餐。
Don't be angry. 别生气。
Dogs are loyal animals. 狗是忠诚的动物。
Would you like another cup of tea?_你想再来一杯茶吗？
Can you answer this question?_你能回答这个问题吗？
Do you have any questions?_你有任何问题吗？
Is anybody home?_有人在家吗？
Anyone can join. 任何人都可以加入。
I don't know anything. 我什么都不知道。
It's raining, but let's go anyway. 在下雨，但我们还是去吧。
You can sit anywhere. 你可以坐在任何地方。
The sun appeared from behind the clouds. 太阳从云层后面出现了。
An apple a day keeps the doctor away. 一天一苹果，医生远离我。
April is the fourth month. 四月是第四个月。
This area is famous for its scenery. 这个地区以其风景而闻名。
Raise your arm. 举起你的胳膊。
The army defended the country. 军队保卫了国家。
We walked around the lake. 我们绕着湖走。
What time did you arrive?_你什么时候到的？
Art enriches our lives. 艺术丰富了我们的生活。
I wrote an article for the newspaper. 我为报纸写了一篇文章。
As a student, you should study hard. 作为一名学生，你应该努力学习。
May I ask a question?_我可以问一个问题吗？

I'll meet you at the station. 我在车站等你。
The dog attacked the stranger. 狗攻击了陌生人。
I attend school every day. 我每天上学。
Pay attention to the teacher. 注意听老师讲课。

My aunt is a nurse. 我的阿姨是护士。
Autumn is my favorite season. 秋天是我最喜欢的季节。

I was awake all night. 我整夜都没睡。
Go away!_走开！

Turn back, please. 请转身回来。

Let's play ball. 我们来打球吧。

Let's go to the beach. 我们去海滩吧。
